column1: Vendor-validation source for the invoicing agent. A vendor bill may be posted automatically only if the supplier appears here with Status = Approved. Vendors not on this list must be routed to a manual Supplier Evaluation (SE) review.

column2: Vendors that appear on incoming invoices but are NOT listed above (e.g. "Northwind Office Supplies Ltd") are unapproved and must be flagged for Supplier Evaluation (SE), not posted.
